atac_fill_method: GSE205033 DESeq2 full peak set, 500kb TSS window
key_findings: ATAC fill (500kb window) recovered KRAS=-1.39, correctly deprioritizing it
KRAS ECM-enriched chromatin is the key discriminating signal
Enformer alone AUROC=0.53 — weak signal alone but ~0.08 lift in ONC composite
TSG class: abs_crispr AUROC=0.83 — dominant single signal
ONC class: ATAC AUROC=0.82 (observed) — dominant single signal
Class-aware routing is the architectural innovation that drives the gain
paper_claim: A class-aware multi-modal composite achieves AUROC=0.7278, compared to Evo2-alone 0.5778 and |CRISPRa|-alone 0.6556, by routing TSGs through CRISPRa magnitude (AUROC=0.83 on TSGs) and oncogenes through ATAC chromatin accessibility (AUROC=0.82 on observed ONC genes).
